quote:
Saying goodbye/seeU to U, is where I feel to do time travel again and again every single time...
Now it feels like… do it and hit me so hard that I fall into the sea that night.

Most prettiest/sexiest rider bike got...
Today modi said to use fuel efficiency (maybe gov. will increase petrol prices), but 1 thing is for sure,
I will not hesitate a bit agar petrol prices surge to 1k/liter to come to just see you (doesn't matter if it's runwal or pune)

This smile....this smile will make even a dead plant alive.
NOW, I'm feeling like a dead 🪾 plant, for whatever I said..😔

Here comes the queen of rain, right hath m phone, left hath m water bottle......😀.
So so so sry to THE queen 👑
his is an AI generated image, but the creators feelings are TRUE....
Bhagy hai sabka k they r witnessing this pic of you, aur saubhagy hai uss sunflower ka jo tere sath hai

This one is very very special for me, it penetrated me like aircraft penetrates air after speed mach 1
And I will never ever want u to get hurt my me..😔
